See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 9752 => 'Thimphu', 9753 => 'Trongsa', 9754 => 'Trashigang', 9755 => 'Phuentsholing', 9756 => 'Gelephu', 97572 => 'Samdrup Jongkhar', 97574 => 'Samdrup Jongkhar', 97576 => 'Samdrup Jongkhar', 9758 => 'Paro', ];
